comment.body:
like in chess, for example: you don't know what move your opponent will make next.
but based on your experience, intellectual skills, mental fitness, and other variables, you can pre-project possible scenarios, 
break it down to yourself, the consequences of those scenarios,
and hedge them by making a move
based on your understanding/consideration
